REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC., JAMES NUNEMACHER DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULLED IN PART. DEMURRER TO FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED, PLAINTIFF ALLEGES SUFFICIENT FACTS FOR BREACH OF ORAL CONTRACT. DEFENDANTS' ASKS THE COURT TO MAKE FACTUAL DETERMINATIONS BY WEIGHING EVIDENCE, WHICH IS IMPROPER ON DEMURRER. FOR SIMILAR REASONS, DEMURRER TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR QUANTUM MERUIT AND THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR PROMISSORY ESTOPPEL ARE OVERRULLED. DEMURRER TO THE FOURTH AND FIFTH CAUSES OF ACTION ARE OVERRULLED, PLAINTIFF ALLEGES SUFFICIENT FACTS FOR FRAUD AND NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION. DEMURRER TO THE SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION UNDER BUSINESS AND PROFESSIONS CODE SECTION 17200 IS OVERRULED, PLAINTIFF ALLEGES SUFFICIENT FACTS. DEMURRER TO THE SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR REFORMATION IS OVERRULLED, DEFENDANT ASKS THE COURT TO MAKE FACTUAL DETERMINATIONS BY WEIGHING EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES SUFFICIENT FACTS FOR REFORMATION. DEFENDANT HAS TWENTY DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER TO FILE AN ANSWER. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC., JAMES NUNEMACHER MOTION OF DEFENDANTS JAMES NUNEMACHER AND VANGUARD PROPERTIES INC TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED UPON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUNE 20, 2018. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC., JAMES NUNEMACHER MOTION OF DEFENDANTS JAMES NUNEMACHER AND VANGUARD PROPERTIES INC MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION (FAC, 44-47, PRAYER FOR RELIEF, 3) IS DENIED. THE SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION IS WITHIN THE SCOPE OF THE COURT'S PREVIOUS ORDER SUSTAINING WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES (FAC, 34; PRAYER FOR RELIEF, 4) IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES SUFFICIENT FACTS TO SUPPORT A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD, WHICH IS ALL CIVIL CODE 3294(A) REQUIRES. MOTION TO STRIKE PRAYER FOR RESTITUTION (PRAYER FOR RELIEF, 2) IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR QUANTUM MERUIT SUPPORTS PRAYER FOR RESTITUTION. MOTION TO STRIKE OTHER ALLEGATIONS (FAC, 9-13, 15, 16, 18, 20, 22, 24, 30, 41, 45-47) IS DENIED. DEFENDANTS ASK THE COURT TO MAKE FACTUAL DETERMINATIONS BY WEIGHING EVIDENCE. DEFENDANT HAS TWENTY DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER TO FILE AN ANSWER. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC., JAMES NUNEMACHER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: SUSTAINED. DEMURRER TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR UNJUST ENRICHMENT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. DEMURRER TO OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. DEMURRER BASED ON ILLEGALITY OF REFERRAL FEE IS OVERRULED AS IT INVOLVES ISSUES OF FACT THAT CANNOT BE DETERMINED ON A DEMURRER. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE OF EXHIBIT 3 IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-20-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark R. Wilson of Manning & Kass (415.400.0829) appearing for defendants/moving parties.
Philip K. Lem of Payne & Fears (949.797.1201) for plaintiff/responding party.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument the Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC., JAMES NUNEMACHER DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULLED. Demurrer to First Cause of Action is OVERRULED, Plaintiff alleges sufficient facts for breach of oral contract. Defendants' asks the Court to make factual determinations by weighing evidence, which is improper on demurrer. For similar reasons, Demurrer to the Second Cause of Action for Quantum Meruit and Third Cause of Action for Promissory Estoppel are OVERRULLED. Demurrer to the Fourth and Fifth Causes of Action are OVERRULLED, Plaintiff alleges sufficient facts for fraud and negligent misrepresentation. Demurrer to the Sixth Cause of Action under Business and Professions Code section 17200 is OVERRULED, Plaintiff alleges sufficient facts. Demurrer to the Seventh Cause of Action for Reformation is OVERRULLED, Defendant asks the Court to make factual determinations by weighing evidence. Plaintiff alleges sufficient facts for reformation. Defendant has twenty days from notice of entry of order to file an answer. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Motion Of Defendants James Nunemacher And Vanguard Properties Inc To Strike Portions Of The First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-20-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark R. Wilson of Manning & Kass (415.400.0829) appearing for defendants/moving parties.
Philip K. Lem of Payne & Fears (949.797.1201) for plaintiff/responding party.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument the Court rule as follows: DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC., JAMES NUNEMACHER Motion Of Defendants James Nunemacher And Vanguard Properties Inc Motion To Strike Portions Of The First Amended Complaint is DENIED. Motion to Strike Plaintiff's Seventh Cause of Action (FAC, 44-47, Prayer for Relief, 3) is DENIED. The Seventh Cause of Action is within the scope of the Court's previous order sustaining with leave to amend. Motion to Strike punitive damages (FAC, 34; Prayer for Relief, 4) is DENIED. Plaintiff alleges sufficient facts to support a cause of action for fraud, which is all Civil Code 3294(a) requires. Motion to Strike prayer for restitution (Prayer for Relief, 2) is DENIED. Plaintiff's Second Cause of Action for Quantum Meruit supports prayer for restitution. Motion to Strike other allegations (FAC, 9-13, 15, 16, 18, 20, 22, 24, 30, 41, 45-47) is DENIED. Defendants ask the Court to make factual determinations by weighing evidence. Defendant has twenty days from notice of entry of order to file an answer. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Off Calendar Mar-05-2018 Continued To May-23-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-15-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC., JAMES NUNEMACHER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Appearances: Mark R. Wilson of Manning & Kass (415.400.0829) appearing for defendants and moving parties; Philip K. Lem of Payne & Fears (949.797.1201) for plaintiff and responding party.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: SUSTAINED. Demurrer to the cause of action for unjust enrichment is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Demurrer to other causes of action is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege each element of each cause of action including but not limited to, all terms of the oral contract (specifically address how the terms of the purported oral contract are the same or different from the terms of the unsigned attached written contract); all elements of UCL cause of action; fraud with specificity. Demurrer based on illegality of referral fee is overruled as it involves issues of fact that cannot be determined on a demurrer. Defendant's request for judicial notice of Exhibit 3 is denied. Order signed. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/GLW)
